name: Indian Institute of Technology Hyderabad
overview: Indian Institute of Technology Hyderabad (IIT Hyderabad), established in 2008, is one of India's fastest-growing IITs. Known for innovation-driven research and strong industry partnerships, it offers cutting-edge programs in AI, Data Science, and Engineering.
accreditation: Institute of National Importance; NAAC 'A++' accredited.

coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: ₹1,00,000 per semester for General/OBC (income > ₹5 lakh). Income-based and caste-based waivers apply. Additional ~₹43,000 per semester for hostel, mess, and other charges.
₹6,000 per semester (Regular). Sponsored: ₹40,000–₹50,000. SC/ST/PwD: Tuition exempted. Other charges ~₹47,000.

placements.companiesVisited: Google, Microsoft, Amazon, Qualcomm, Goldman Sachs, Texas Instruments, Mercari, Toyota
placements.internationalOffers: 53 international offers in 2024–25; major increase in 2025 Phase 1

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are based on national-level exams followed by JoSAA or COAP counseling or departmental selection.
admissions.importantDates: Admissions follow JoSAA/COAP timelines and institute academic calendar.

campus.specialNote: Other semester charges (~₹43,000) cover hostel, mess, and semester registration. One-time admission fees total ₹17,000.

contact.address: Indian Institute of Technology Hyderabad, Kandi, Sangareddy – 502285, Telangana, India
